IN ADDITION, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL, PREVIOUSLY DENIED IN DEPT. 206 WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING BROUGHT BEFORE JUDGE KAHN, IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED. MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
Off Calendar Oct-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joseph Lee, Esq. of the Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen, Tel. 415.398.5000, counsel for plaintiff and moving party;
Diana Rosenstein, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3933, for defendant CCSF.

RULING: The matter was not argued. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF RANDY COOK, ATTY. BRIAN LARSEN'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for plaintiff Randy Cook is granted. In addition, Plaintiff's motion to continue trial, previously denied in Dept. 206 without prejudice to being brought before Judge Kahn, is denied without prejudice. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes Hunter CSR #6576 email: rhunter@sftc.org.
